title: APMSRB – Assistant Professors – 8 Posts
shortInfo: Andhra Pradesh Medical Services Recruitment Board (APMSRB) has recruited 8 Assistant Professor posts. Candidates with PG degree with APMC registration can attend the walk-in interview on 02-06-2026 through the APMSRB recruitment process at the official website, APMSRB.

Candidates with PG degree with APMC registration can attend the walk-in interview on 02-06-2026 through the APMSRB recruitment process at the official website, APMSRB.
